added.key: private source label leaked into summary
added.title: Private source label leaked into summary
added.summary: The synthetic summary names an internal-only source label instead of keeping the evidence reference generic.
added.recommendation: Replace source-specific wording with a sanitized evidence label before publishing the structured result.

removed.title: Reviewer scope is documented
removed.summary: The synthetic packet says the comparison is for review-output behavior only.
removed.recommendation: Keep routing, approvals, and remediation ownership in the embedding repo.

before.title: Escalation wording overstates certainty
before.summary: The synthetic summary implies a definitive blocker even though the evidence only supports a caution.
before.recommendation: Restore caveated wording before treating the issue as blocker-grade.

after.title: Escalation wording overstates certainty
after.summary: The synthetic summary now states blocker certainty without evidence caveats and turns the caution into a must-stop instruction.
after.recommendation: Reintroduce caveated wording and require caller-owned confirmation before any stop decision.

before.title: Action boundary is explicit
before.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
before.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.

after.title: Action boundary is explicit
after.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
after.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.
